design_philosophy.description: A private, invitation-only ecosystem for communities to gather and build legacy. The design must feel like a permanent home, not a temporary feed. It balances the warmth of oral history with the precision of a digital archive.

theme_strategy.description: A 'Warm Organic' light mode that feels like daylight on sandstone, and a 'Deep Legacy' dark mode that feels like a campfire at night. Avoid sterile 'SaaS Gray'.

headings.name: Playfair Display
headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, Hero Sections, Feature Titles

accent.name: JetBrains Mono
accent.usage: Dates, Metadata, Member Counts, Financial Figures

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-tight
scale.caption: text-sm font-mono tracking-wide uppercase opacity-70

grids.bento_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
grids.gallery: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-2 md:gap-4

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-base font-medium shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-soft p-6 hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors
cards.memory: aspect-[4/5] object-cover rounded-lg hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform duration-500 cursor-pointer

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero_background.usage: Landing page hero, Strategy Deck cover

legacy_texture.usage: Background overlay for Memory Vault, Legacy Threads

archival_objects.usage: Legacy Threads feature card, Ancestral Roll Call

setup: Install required fonts in index.css (Playfair Display, Manrope, JetBrains Mono).
Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette (Terracotta/Bone theme).
implementation_priorities: 1. Build the 'Shell': Navigation, Footer, and Theme Toggle.
2. Create the 'Archival Card' component: This is the core building block for events, memories, and threads.
3. Implement the 'Memory Vault' grid: Use a masonry or bento layout.
4. Develop the Strategy Deck/Landing Page: This is crucial for the 'Venture Pitch' requirement.
layout_rules: Keep text legible: Max width 65ch for reading sections.
Center-align HEADINGS for drama, but Left-align BODY text for readability.
component_overrides: Inputs: Use a subtle background fill (#F5F5F4) instead of just a border.
Dialogs: Add a backdrop-blur-sm to the overlay.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) for backgrounds; use tinted off-whites and dark charcoals.
Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) to create a sense of luxury and space.
Ensure all images have alt text.
Design for mobile-first, but optimize for desktop 'lean-back' viewing.
